# Sensor Parser Golden Vectors

This directory holds sensor parser vectors for shared parser ownership coverage across ECG, ACC, GYR, MAG, PPG, PPI, pressure, temperature, skin-temperature, offline HR, and GNSS. `EcgParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared ECG raw type-0 signed 24-bit parsing, per-sample timestamp interpolation, malformed raw type-0 short-sample policy, explicit platform-owned raw type 1-3 deferral, and `protocol/sensors/ecg-readiness.json`/`ecg-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `ecgReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `raw-type0-signed-24bit-parsing`, `raw-type0-malformed-short-sample-policy`, `android-raw-type3-frame-sample-ownership`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production ECG parsing moves. `AccParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared ACC raw type-0/type-1 signed XYZ parsing, timestamp interpolation, compressed type-0/type-1 reference/delta decoding, milliG factor scaling, unsupported compressed-frame rejection, explicit platform-owned raw type-2 plus malformed/truncated payload deferral, and `protocol/sensors/acc-readiness.json`/`acc-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `accReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `raw-type0-signed-axis-boundaries`, `compressed-type0-millig-factor-scaling`, `raw-type2-android-ownership`, `truncated-compressed-delta-payload-policy`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production ACC parsing moves. `GyrParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared GYR compressed type-0 signed reference/delta decoding, factor scaling, timestamp interpolation, unsupported raw/compressed-frame rejection, explicit Android-owned compressed type-1 plus malformed/truncated payload deferral, and `protocol/sensors/gyr-readiness.json`/`gyr-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `gyrReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `compressed-type0-reference-delta-decoding`, `compressed-type0-factor-scaling`, `android-compressed-type1-ownership`, `truncated-compressed-delta-payload-policy`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production GYR parsing moves. `MagParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared MAG compressed type-0/type-1 signed reference/delta decoding, factor scaling, milliGauss-to-Gauss conversion, calibration-status mapping, unsupported raw/compressed-frame rejection, malformed/truncated payload deferral, and `protocol/sensors/mag-readiness.json`/`mag-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `magReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `compressed-type0-reference-delta-decoding`, `compressed-type1-calibration-status-mapping`, `compressed-type1-milligauss-to-gauss-conversion`, `truncated-compressed-delta-payload-policy`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production MAG parsing moves. `PpgParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared PPG raw type-0 channel/ambient parsing, raw type-4/type-9/type-14 integration/gain sample-shape policy, raw type-5 operation mode, raw type-6 sport ID, compressed type-7/type-8/type-10/type-13 reference/status decoding, type-10 status padding and current red/green platform split, unsupported-frame rejection, raw type-0/type-4/type-5/type-6 malformed payload rejection, compressed type-7 truncated delta-payload rejection, explicit type-13 malformed platform-split deferral, and the `ppg-frame-family-shared-contract-readiness.json` frame-family manifest before the remaining PPG parser families move; the manifest still requires compile-verified shared common execution before production shared ownership. `PpiParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared PPI raw type-0 HR/RR/error/status parsing, zero-timestamp behavior, timestamp backfill from following RR intervals, unsupported raw/compressed frame rejection, deterministic truncated-sample policy, and `protocol/sensors/ppi-readiness.json`/`ppi-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `ppiReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `raw-type0-hr-rr-error-status-parsing`, `raw-type0-zero-timestamp-policy`, `raw-type0-timestamp-backfill`, `truncated-raw-sample-policy`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production PPI parsing moves. `PressureTemperatureParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared pressure/temperature raw type-0 IEEE-754 little-endian parsing, negative and boundary float values, per-sample timestamp interpolation, unsupported raw/compressed frame rejection, deterministic truncated-sample policy, named compressed pressure one-channel-indexing plus compressed temperature sample-count deferral, and `protocol/sensors/pressure-temperature-readiness.json`/`pressure-temperature-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `pressureTemperatureReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `pressure-raw-type0-ieee754-parsing`, `temperature-raw-type0-ieee754-parsing`, `compressed-pressure-one-channel-indexing-deferral`, `compressed-temperature-sample-count-deferral`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before scalar parser code moves. `GnssLocationOwnershipCommonPolicyTest.kt` now pins GNSS raw type 0-3 vectors as shared common, Android production-delegated, and non-iOS, and executes `protocol/sensors/gnss-location-readiness.json`/`gnss-location-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `gnssLocationReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedParserDelegationFamily` for `shared-parser-raw-type0-coordinate`, `shared-parser-raw-type1-satellite-dilution`, `shared-parser-raw-type2-satellite-summary`, `shared-parser-raw-type3-nmea`, `android-production-delegation`, `non-ios-parser-ownership`, `shared-parser-parity-gate`, and the `compile-verification-gate`; `SensorParserProductionCommonPolicyTest.kt` executes all four GNSS vectors against production shared parser code while iOS remains no direct parser surface. `OfflineHrParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared offline HR raw type-0 HR-only samples, raw type-1 HR/PPG-quality/corrected-HR triples, empty recordings, unsupported compressed/raw frame rejection, deterministic truncated-tuple policy, and `protocol/sensors/offline-hr-readiness.json`/`offline-hr-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `offlineHrReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `raw-type0-hr-only-samples`, `raw-type0-empty-recording`, `raw-type1-hr-ppg-quality-corrected-hr-triples`, `truncated-raw-type1-tuple-policy`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production offline HR parsing moves. `SkinTemperatureParserCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared skin-temperature raw type-0 IEEE-754 parsing, sample-rate timestamp-estimation policy, unsupported frame rejection, deterministic truncated-sample rejection, explicit iOS-empty malformed-payload deferral, and `protocol/sensors/skin-temperature-readiness.json`/`skin-temperature-readiness` behavior-family coverage through `skinTemperatureReadinessManifestNamesEverySharedContractBehaviorFamily` for `raw-type0-ieee754-skin-temperature-parsing`, `sample-rate-timestamp-estimation-policy`, `ios-empty-malformed-payload-deferral`, `truncated-raw-sample-policy`, and the `compile-verification-gate` before production skin-temperature parsing moves.

For every sensor parser, include:

- At least one valid single-frame vector.
- At least one valid multi-sample vector.
- Boundary values for signed and unsigned fields.
- Timestamp behavior.
- Empty payload behavior.
- Malformed payload length.
- Unknown or unsupported frame version where applicable.
